outreach_subject: The Mediterranean has been doing WPH Plus for generations

replies.subject: Re: The Mediterranean has been doing WPH Plus for generations
replies.body:
Id like to stop cal with paolo when is he available ?


> Il giorno 23 apr 2026, alle ore 19:45, Lisa Monelli <info@myvilla.la> ha scritto:
> 
> Hi Ivo,
> 
> Enjoyed reading your latest on how builders are adapting to WPH Plus —
> you caught something most coverage misses: that the certification is
> quietly becoming a shared language between carriers and code
> officials.
> 
> A quick hello from our side: at My Villa, we bring European
> construction resilience and the Italian way of living to homes in Los
> Angeles, designed in exposed reinforced concrete (cemento a vista).
> 
> One thought your piece sparked: the resilience baselines LA is now
> codifying through WPH Plus and WUI codes have been default
> Mediterranean practice for generations. The cultural gap between the
> two construction traditions feels like the real story.
> 
> Would you be interested in receiving a bit more background from our
> side, or in setting up a short call with our founder Paolo?
> 
> Best,
> Lisa Monelli
> My Villa Media Team
> info@myvilla.la · myvilla.la
